description_long: This is a small, cylindrical baby bottle with a rounded base and a slightly tapered neck. The bottle features a blue screw-on cap and a yellow rubber nipple, typical of infant feeding bottles. The main body is white and opaque, with a colorful Care Bears graphic and the text 'Care Bears' on one side, adding a playful and child-friendly touch. The surface appears smooth and clean, with no visible signs of wear or damage. The bottle is likely made of lightweight plastic with a soft rubber nipple and is designed to be easily gripped and handled. Its size and design suggest it is intended for feeding infants and young children.
description: A small, white baby bottle with a blue cap, yellow nipple, and a Care Bears graphic on the side. The bottle is smooth, clean, and child-friendly in appearance.
description_view_0: The bottle is shown at an angle, revealing part of the Care Bears graphic and the blue cap with yellow nipple.
description_view_1: The bottle is viewed from the back, showing a plain white surface with the blue cap and yellow nipple visible.
description_view_2: The bottle is angled to the opposite side, partially showing the Care Bears graphic and the blue cap.
description_view_3: The front view displays the full Care Bears graphic and text, with the blue cap and yellow nipple clearly visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: A colorful Care Bears graphic with three bears and the text 'Care Bears' in blue, centered on the front of the bottle.
